title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad-based monetization is a superior model for AI tools over subscription-only approaches that dominated VC thinking in 2024. He raises that the real bottleneck for AI agents is human trust adoption, not technology itself.
